case_title: JON CARROLL VS. DALE A BLAGROVE et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT BLAGROVE, DALE A
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT EARNSHAW, MARK
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR DEFAULT PROVE-UP IN SCD 218 AT 09:00 AM ON NOVEMBER 18,2002 HEARING SET FOR NOV-18-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 218
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: PLAINTIFF JON CARROLL RECOVER FROM DALE A. BLAGROVE AND MARK EARNSHAW JOINTLY AND INDIVDUALLY $90,939.14 PRINCIPAL, $10,377.45 INTEREST ON UNPAID INVOICES, AND $12,105.94 ATTORNEY FEES AND COST PER CONTRACT FOR A TOTAL JUDGMENT OF $113,422.50 TOGETHER WITH INTEREST THEREON AT THE CONTRACT RATE OF 18% PER YEAR FROM THE DATE OF THIS JUDGMENT UNTIL THE BALANCE IS PAID. PLAINTIFF HAS A LIEN ON THE PROPERTY AT 3910 22ND STREET SAN FRANCISCO IN ENTIRETY FOR THE AMOUNTS ADJUDGED AND DECREED HEREINABOVE TO BE DUE. FURTHER ALL OF THE SUBJECT REAL PROPERTY AT THE GIVEN ADDRESS SHALL BE SOLD AT PUBLIC AUCTION BY THE SHERIFF OF SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY PURSUANT TO PUBLIC NOTICE AT THE TIME AND PLACE OF THE SALE ACCORDING TO THE RULES AND PRACTICES OF THIS COURT AND THE LAW RELATIVE TO SALE OF REAL ESTATE UNDER EXECUTION. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH FOR NUMEROUS DETAILS.
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-18-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 218
UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF NOV-18-2002, DEFAULT PROVE-UP IN SCD 218 AT 09:00 AM ON NOVEMBER 18,2002 GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER. COMMISSIONER LORETTA M. NORRIS; CLERK: P. DIAS; REPORTER: PATRICK HEALD.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-29-2003 Off Calendar

Modified Interlocutory Judgment - Court Confirmation In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On December 17, 2002.
Off Calendar Dec-17-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Floyd Butler. There being no appearance by either party, the matter is ordered off calendar.

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On November 18,2002
Off Calendar Nov-18-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing on Default Prove-Up. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patrick Heald. Petitioner was represented by Michael Brooks Carroll, Esq. Petitioner Jon Arthur Carroll, was sworn and examined. The following exhibits were marked for identification and moved into evidence: 1) Checks returned from bank; 2) Promissory Note - secured by Real Property; 3) Grant Deed dated April 5, 2002; 4) Deed of Trust dated April 25, 2002 in favor of Bank of America construction lender; 5) Grant Deed recorded in San Francisco on May 14, 2002; 6) Submitted Invoices; 7) Invoice for Sunset Scavenger Co.; 8) Invoice for Solarus House; 9) Statement of items for unpaid movers and 10) Letter dated June 27, 2002. The Court having received evidence; grants judgment as follows: Principal: $78,884.41; $10,377.45 Penalty on amount not paid; $12,054.73 Equipment rental invoice; $12,105.94 Attorney fees and costs for a total judgment of $113,422.50, Order signed in open court. The Court orders the exhibits withdrawn and returned to counsel for safekeeping.
